creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
vym's latest version is 1.13.27. Check http://sourceforge.net/projects/vym/ for details.

Fix: I modified 2 things at the same time:

	1. The short description. The official description is "VYM (View Your Mind) is a tool to generate and manipulate maps which show your thoughts.", while the one used by the port dropped "which show your thoughts". I replaced the description with a more clear one.

	2. DATADIR substitution. If DATADIR contains more than one "/vym", bug happens. Now I only replace the last occurrence of "/vym".
